session_message_limit.description: Recent message cache size per QQ session
session_message_limit.hint: Recommended 100-500 for the first validation build.

contact_ttl.description: Friend and group metadata cache TTL in seconds
contact_ttl.hint: Used to avoid repeated OneBot refresh calls.

group_member_ttl.description: Group member cache TTL in seconds
group_member_ttl.hint: Lower values refresh faster but cost more OneBot calls.

max_media_size.description: Maximum uploaded media size in bytes
max_media_size.hint: Default is 15 MB. Increase carefully to avoid memory and storage pressure.
